comments.body: @cevich can you help us get off of papr all together?

> can you help us get off of papr all together?

Yep, sure can, thanks for the reminder.
Forcing merge on this, Since the other errors are not related

This doesn't work because `fedora/30/atomic` doesn't exist (though PAPR should've probably given a better error message here). The latest FAH release will be FAH29 (i.e. `fedora/29/atomic`).

>> can you help us get off of papr all together?
>
> Yep, sure can, thanks for the reminder.

:+1:
Just downgraded to Atomic 29 in https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1845.  Thanks for the heads up @jlebon

Ref: [Moving into Cirrus-CI](https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1848) will need to modify support for testing under Atomic.  We can take the same direction as for podman: Simply use a regular Fedora VM for the host, but run the tests in a container-image.  It's not a perfect solution, but there's almost-zero[*] hope of getting anything Atomic-like working under Google + Cirrus-Ci.

_[*]Extraordinary efforts are required to cope with both cloud and automation aspects we have no control over._
That is fine with me.  All that we do, is run the containers in containers test correct?  Make it match podman totally, makes sense.
yep yep, matchie matchie, same same.
